reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty, terrible campus, and average facilities.

review_content.Placements: This year, we had 60 students in our batch (40 girls, 20 boys). The average B.A. MS students earned around Rs. 20000 to Rs. 40000 after graduation. They could work as assistant doctors under an experienced doctor in his hospital or clinic. The internship was compulsory for everyone in the 5th year of the course. Most of students worked as assistant doctors or prepared for the post-graduation course, while some prepared for government positions in the medical field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus was located in the countryside of Risode, so the environment was fresh and calm. The hostel was only available for girls and was located on the campus. Boys had to stay in the nearest town (Risode), approximately 9 km from the college. content.Placements: I am a first-year student. The first-year theory paper is just in March, so I am preparing for my exam paper. I revision, each subject, and one by one completed chapters. content.Infrastructure: College is average, but the structure is not well developed, but the classrooms are very good and significant. individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty, terrible campus, and average facilities.

content.Placements: This year, we had 60 students in our batch (40 girls, 20 boys). The average B.A. MS students earned around Rs. 20000 to Rs. 40000 after graduation. They could work as assistant doctors under an experienced doctor in his hospital or clinic. The internship was compulsory for everyone in the 5th year of the course. Most of students worked as assistant doctors or prepared for the post-graduation course, while some prepared for government positions in the medical field.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was located in the countryside of Risode, so the environment was fresh and calm. The rooms were equipped with smart boards and projectors, which were used often. There was no Wi-Fi on campus. The library had all kinds of books for each year of the course. The hostel was only available for girls and was located on the campus. Boys had to stay in the nearest town (Risode), approximately 9 km from the college. The food in the canteen was average and included in the hostel fees. There were regular tournaments for cricket.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are good. We can become an intelligent doctor in our college.

content.Placements: There is 100 students capacity in my college. The package is 10 LPA for every student from my college. Top Hospitals like Super Specialty, City Hospital, and Ayurveda Centres are better to live longer. 99% of students and doctors do practice and jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel in top of our area. It is under our college. The hostel facility is all about good. The mess is also healthy. Wi-Fi, computers, and full mobile network. There are good facilities. Sports are indoor and outdoor also available. They are the best.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is very good and the teaching staff support students to get success.

review_content.Placements: As a pharmacist and as a chemist many institutions offer specialist facilities for students in certain courses, so it was worth checking out the facilities on offer for students in this field. Students may find moot courts for law students, performance and exhibition spaces for creative arts students, simulated hospital wards for nursing students, recording studios for media students, and on-campus clinics for psychology students the list goes on.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, a library and Wi-Fi were available. They were easily accessible access to a well-stocked library makes it a lot easier to complete their assignments and get some quiet study done between classes. Some institutions also provide house faculty-specific libraries such as for business or law or subject-specific libraries such as for cinema studies. Most facilities also stock plenty of fiction, magazines, and even DVDs, and most allow personal internet use.
